name: Wild Green Salad
recipeIngredient: -OR- Curly Endive Leaves (the inner white ones)
Watercress, Rock Cress or Field Cress
Dill or Fennel Greens and Hyssop Leaves
recipeInstructions:
Wash and dry all the greens. Tear or cut them into whatever size you like, and put them into a large bowl with the scallions and toasted sunflower seeds. Pour over the dressing (see recipe below) and toss well.
Dressing:
Whisk together 2 tablespoons plain or herbal vinegar (such as tarragon vinegar), salt, and 5 tablespoons sunflower seed oil (or extra-virgin olive oil or walnut oil). Taste and adjust with more vinegar or oil as needed.
